query:
SELECT 
  MONTH(createdAt) as mes,
  YEAR(createdAt) as ano,
  COUNT(*) as total_vendas,
  status
FROM sales
WHERE YEAR(createdAt) = 2026 AND MONTH(createdAt) IN (1, 2)
GROUP BY MONTH(createdAt), YEAR(createdAt), status
ORDER BY MONTH(createdAt), status;
